description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - OSX/Linux via Conda that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job to run on both ubuntu-latest and macos-latest, checking out the repository, setting up ccache, initializing submodules, installing Miniconda, and activating the pinocchio environment. Then, install cmake, build Pinocchio with specific configuration, run tests, and uninstall Pinocchio.
